data.title: Crypto billionaire to splash $20 million on these cryptocurrencies
data.description:

According to the Tron founder, he intends to allocate $10 million toward unspecified altcoins, with the remaining amount directed to the newly launched WLFI. We believe U.S

data.title: Gold's Trustworthiness Compared to Bitcoin Discussed by Trader
data.description: According to Foresight News, cryptocurrency trader James Wynn recently tweeted that gold is currently more trustworthy than Bitcoin. However, he suggested that this situation might reverse in the future.

data.title: ALT5 Sigma's holdings of WLFI tokens increased to 7.28 billion, worth approximately $1.31 billion
data.description: ALT 5 Sigma Corporation, the Nasdaq-listed WLFI treasury, updated its holdings, revealing that as of September 5th, the company's holdings of WLFI tokens had increased to 7,283,585,650, valued at approximately $1.31 billion at a market price of $0.18. ALT 5 Sigma also disclosed that it currently holds 124,946,728 shares of common stock and prepaid warrants to subscribe for up to 99 million shares of the outstanding common stock. (Businesswire)

data.title: Tether CEO Confirms Stablecoin Giant Will Deploy $200,000,000 in Gold Mining and Royalties in Pursuit of ‘Stability Maximalism’
data.description:
The chief executive of stablecoin issuer Tether says that the firm is investing in gold mining as a means of obtaining maximum stability for its asset-pegged digital asset products. In a new post on X, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino confirms that the company is venturing outside the world of digital assets, calling it “stability maximalism.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/09/06/tether-ceo-confirms-the-stablecoin-giant-will-deploy-200000000-in-gold-mining-and-royalties-in-pursuit-of-stability-maximum/

data.title: Bitget Onchain Trading (Onchain) Launches MEMELESS
data.description: Bitget's Onchain trading platform has launched MEMELESS, the Solana ecosystem's MEME token. Users can start trading on the Onchain trading section. Bitget Onchain aims to seamlessly connect CEXs and DEXs, providing users with a more convenient, efficient, and secure on-chain trading experience. Users can directly trade popular on-chain assets (USDT/USDC) using their Bitget spot accounts. Currently, popular public chains such as Solana (SOL), BNB Smart Chain (BSC), and Base are supported.

data.title: The founder of RMRK claimed that his address was mistakenly identified as high-risk by WLFI and locked
data.description: RMRK founder Bruno Skvorc stated in a post that his address was mistakenly flagged as high-risk by the WLFI team, resulting in the locking of his tokens. On-chain analyst ZachXBT commented that WLFI's proactive address review may protect victims to some extent, but false positives and the blacklisting of legitimate users could severely damage the project's reputation. He also expressed hope that the false positive issue could be resolved quickly.

data.title: Ark Invest Increases Holdings in BitMine Stocks
data.description:
According to PANews, Tom Lee, Chairman of BitMine's board, shared on the X platform that Ark Invest, led by Cathie Wood, has increased its holdings by acquiring 388,045 shares of BMNR stock on September 5. 

Further data from Ark Invest Tracker reveals that Ark Invest's three ETFs now hold BMNR stocks valued at $267 million. The breakdown includes ARKK with $178.6 million, ARKF with $31 million, and ARKW with $57.7 million in BMNR shares.

data.title: SEC unveils cross-border task force to tackle fraud
data.description:
The United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has announced the formation of a new cross-border task force to address international fraud.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sec-cross-border-task-force-fraud/

data.title: MyStonks and Oracle Project APRO reached a strategic cooperation in the RWA field
data.description: MyStonks, a decentralized trading platform for US stock tokens, announced a strategic partnership with APRO, an oracle project. The two parties will collaborate on in-depth data collaboration in the decentralized asset management (RWA) sector. APRO is a professional oracle service provider, providing verifiable data for DeFi, RWA, and artificial intelligence (AI). APRO ranks sixth in TVS in DeFi and has integrated with over 30 blockchains. In the RWA sector, it provides accurate, manipulation-resistant data on US Treasuries, stocks, and commodities. In the AI ​​sector, it has partnered with over 20 AI agents and supports mainstream frameworks such as DeepSeek and ElizaOS. MyStonks has listed over 185 US stock tokens, with cumulative RWA trading volume exceeding $1.45 billion and over 40,000 users. This partnership will provide better underlying support for MyStonks' asset pricing mechanism, further optimize trading risk control, and strengthen the platform's decentralized trading capabilities.

data.title: Bitwise Registers Avalanche ETF Entity in Delaware
data.description: According to PANews, market sources indicate that Bitwise has completed the registration of an Avalanche (AVAX) ETF entity in Delaware, USA. This registration marks an initial step before submitting a formal ETF application to regulatory authorities and does not constitute an official filing.

data.title: Fed Rate Cuts Could Spark a Crypto Rally – Here’s Why LINK May Leave ADA Behind
data.description:
"Potential cuts to the Federal Reserve's interest rates could ignite a significant rally in the cryptocurrency market, and among the various digital assets, Chainlink (LINK) appears poised for remarkable growth. This is particularly noteworthy considering its potential to outperform Cardano (ADA) in the coming months. Here’s an in-depth analysis of the factors driving this perspective, including the unique attributes of LINK, market sentiment, and the overall economic environment."
source: https://blocknews.com/fed-rate-cuts-could-spark-a-crypto-rally-heres-why-link-may-leave-ada-behind/
